title: Rate Plan
description: A commercial offer combining pricing rules, inclusions, restrictions, and cancellation terms. One file per plan in rate_plans/. All monetary values are in the property currency (defined in property.yaml).

meal_plan.description: Meal inclusions baked into this rate. Additional inclusions listed in the inclusions field.

applies_to.description: Room type IDs this plan is offered for. Must reference IDs from room_types/.

pricing.description: Pricing rules. Nightly rate is computed as: base_rate × seasonal_modifier × dow_modifier.

room_rates.description: Base nightly rate per room type. Keys must be IDs from applies_to. Values are in the property currency.

seasonal_modifiers.description: Date-range price adjustments. Evaluated in order; the first matching range applies. Ranges may not overlap — define them precisely.

label.description: Human-readable label, e.g. 'Summer Peak' or 'Low Season'.

dow_modifiers.description: Day-of-week adjustments. Applied after the seasonal modifier, if any.

extra_person_fee.description: Surcharge per additional adult ABOVE the room's base_occupancy. In property currency, per night.

lower_occupancy_fee.description: Discount per adult BELOW the room's base_occupancy (subtracted from the base rate). In property currency, per night.

child_fee.description: Nightly surcharge per child. If 0, children stay free. Applies to children of any age unless child_fee_max_age is set.

child_fee_max_age.description: Children up to and including this age receive the child_fee rate. Older children are charged the extra_person_fee.

inclusions.description: Additional items included in the rate beyond the meal plan.

inclusions_notes.description: Clarification for 'other' inclusions or details about standard ones.

min_stay_nights.description: Minimum length of stay to book this rate.

advance_booking_min_days.description: Must book at least this many days before arrival. 0 means same-day booking allowed.

advance_booking_max_days.description: Cannot book more than this many days in advance.

closed_to_arrival.description: Guests may not start a stay on these days of the week.

closed_to_departure.description: Guests may not end a stay on these days of the week.

cancellation.description: Cancellation terms for this rate plan. Either reference a named policy from policies.yaml (by id) or define the terms inline.

policy_id.description: References a cancellation policy id defined in policies/policies.yaml.

terms.description: Ordered tiers, most generous first. Each tier applies when cancellation occurs at least before_days before the arrival date. Use before_days: 0 for the no-show / same-day rule.

price_adjustment.description: Percentage (e.g. '+25%', '-10%') or fixed amount (e.g. '+30', '-20.50') in property currency. Percentage adjustments stack multiplicatively when both seasonal and day-of-week apply: final = base × seasonal × dow.

before_days.description: This tier applies when the guest cancels at least this many full days before the arrival date.
